title: The Battlefield the Girl Saw
overview: Aoba manages to escape after being kidnapped and discovers the Jinki.

title: After the Tears
overview: Aoba learns about the Angel and begins training to pilot the Moribito.

title: Quality and Quantity
overview: Aoba learns more about Akao and is introduced to the Angel team.

title: Face-To-Face
overview: Aoba learns she has a rival in Rui, who wants to pilot the Moribito too.

title: Of Enemies and Allies
overview: The past of Kokushou and Genta is revealed.

title: The Pilot in Black
overview: Kouse sends Shizuka to battle Aoba - but will the friends be able to battle?

title: The Ends of Ambition
overview: Akao decides to use her power to help Angel.

title: Silvery-Winged Visitor
overview: For some reason, Shiva and Akana try reaching out to Akao.

title: Winner of the Game
overview: Mel J. Vanette arrives to seek vengeance against J. Harn of the Hachishoujin.

title: Red and Black
overview: Akao is captured by the Kyomu.

title: Family
overview: Aoba returns to Angel and confronts Shiva.

title: Blue and Red
overview: Kyomu's Shiva, along with the brainwashed Akao, take on Aoba Tsuzak and Angel in a battle to the death.

title: And Then...
overview: The members of Angel go separate ways.
